cefunctionid.SQL: UPDATE -%SCHEMA_EXIMTRX%-.INVC_MASTER SET FA_CE_MAIN_REF = '-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_CE_MAIN_REF%-', FA_CE_FR_PENDING = 'Y',C_LOCKED_OP='', C_LOCKED_FLAG='F' WHERE FSBC_REF ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_SBR_REF%-' AND FA_DOC_NO ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_NO%-' AND FA_DOC_DT =TO_DATE('-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_DT%-','YYYY-MM-DD') AND FA_DOC_TYPE = '1'

UPDATE -%SCHEMA_EXIMTRX%-.INVC_MASTER SET FA_CE_MAIN_REF = '-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_CE_MAIN_REF%-', FA_CE_FR_PENDING = 'Y',C_LOCKED_OP='', C_LOCKED_FLAG='F' WHERE FSBC_REF ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_SBR_REF%-' AND FA_DOC_NO ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_NO%-' AND FA_DOC_DT =TO_DATE('-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_DT%-','YYYY-MM-DD') AND FA_DOC_TYPE = '1'

UPDATE -%SCHEMA_EXIMTRX%-.INVC_MASTER SET FA_REQ_BUYER_APR_FLG='2', C_LOCKED_OP='', C_LOCKED_FLAG='F' WHERE FSBC_REF ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_SBR_REF%-' AND FA_DOC_NO ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_NO%-' AND FA_DOC_DT =TO_DATE('-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_DT%-','YYYY-MM-DD') AND FA_DOC_TYPE = '1'

UPDATE -%SCHEMA_EXIMTRX%-.INVC_MASTER SET FA_DOC_STATUS= 'Active' WHERE FSBC_REF ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_SBR_REF%-' AND FA_DOC_NO ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_NO%-' AND FA_DOC_DT =TO_DATE('-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_DT%-','YYYY-MM-DD') AND FA_DOC_TYPE = '1' AND FA_DOC_STATUS= 'Pending'

UPDATE -%SCHEMA_EXIMTRX%-.FADA_MASTER T1 SET T1.FA_TTL_INV_AMT = T1.FA_TTL_INV_AMT + -%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_AMT%-, T1.FA_TTL_INV_BAL = T1.FA_TTL_INV_BAL + -%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_AMT%-, T1.AMT_AVAL_FOR_FUNDING = T1.AMT_AVAL_FOR_FUNDING + -%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_AMT%- * -%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_MAX_LOAN_PERC%- / 100 FROM -%SCHEMA_EXIMTRX%-.FADA_MASTER T1,-%SCHEMA_EXIMTRX%-.INVC_MASTER T2 WHERE T2.FSBC_REF ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_SBR_REF%-' AND T2.FA_DOC_NO ='-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_NO%-' AND T2.FA_DOC_DT =TO_DATE('-%OUT_PASS_FIELD_FA_DOC_DT%-','YYYY-MM-DD') AND T2.FA_DOC_TYPE = '1' AND T2.FA_DOC_STATUS= 'Active' AND T1.C_MAIN_REF = T2.FSBC_REF
